testCases: TC1: input { area:100, depth:4, soilType:"topsoil", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { total: 37.04, breakdown: { volumeCubicFeet: 33.3333..., cubicYards: 1.2346..., soilCost: 37.0370..., deliveryFee: 0 } }
TC2: input { area:0, depth:4, soilType:"topsoil", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { error: "Area must be > 0" }
TC3: input { area:100, depth:0, soilType:"topsoil", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { error: "Depth must be > 0" }
TC4: input { area:-5, depth:4, soilType:"topsoil", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { error: "Area must be > 0" }
TC5: input { area:100, depth:-2, soilType:"topsoil", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { error: "Depth must be > 0" }
TC6: input { area:"abc", depth:4, soilType:"topsoil", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { error: "Area must be a positive number" }
TC7: input { area:100, depth:null, soilType:"topsoil", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { error: "Depth must be a positive number" }
TC8: input { area:50, depth:6, soilType:"Compost", deliveryNeeded:true } → output { total: 91.67, breakdown: ... }
TC9: input { area:100, depth:4, soilType:"invalid", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { error: "Invalid soil type" }
TC10: input { area:100, depth:4, soilType:"topsoil", deliveryNeeded:"false" } → output { error: "Delivery option must be true or false" }
TC11: input { area:1200, depth:12, soilType:"potting_mix", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { total: 2444.44, breakdown: ... }
TC12: input { area:1, depth:1, soilType:"topsoil", deliveryNeeded:true } → output { total: 50.09, breakdown: ... }
TC13: input { area:100, depth:4, soilType:"TOPSOIL", deliveryNeeded:true } → output normalizes to "topsoil", total: 87.04
TC14: input { area:100, depth:0.5, soilType:"topsoil", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { total: 4.63, breakdown: ... }
TC15: input { area:200, depth:3, soilType:"Potting_Mix", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { total: 101.85, breakdown: ... }
TC16: input { area:100, depth:4, deliveryNeeded:false } → output { error: "Soil type is required" }
TC17: input { depth:4, soilType:"topsoil", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { error: "Area is required" }
TC18: input { area:1000, depth:2, soilType:"compost", deliveryNeeded:true } → output { total: 327.78, breakdown: ... }
TC19: input { area:100, depth:4, soilType:"  topsoil  ", deliveryNeeded:false } → output normalizes, total: 37.04
TC20: input { area:NaN, depth:4, soilType:"topsoil", deliveryNeeded:false } → output { error: "Area must be a positive number" }
